SEARCH
Package io.vertigo.datafactory.plugins.search.elasticsearch_7_17.client

Class ClientESSearchServicesPlugin

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.datafactory.plugins.search.elasticsearch_7_17.client.ClientESSearchServicesPlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
io.vertigo.core.node.component.Activeable, io.vertigo.core.node.component.CoreComponent, io.vertigo.core.node.component.Plugin, io.vertigo.datafactory.impl.search.SearchServicesPlugin
public final class ClientESSearchServicesPlugin extends Object implements io.vertigo.datafactory.impl.search.SearchServicesPlugin, io.vertigo.core.node.component.Activeable
Gestion de la connexion au serveur Solr de manière transactionnel.
Author:
dchallas, npiedeloup

      envIndexPrefix - ES index name
      defaultMaxRows - Nombre de lignes
      configFile - Fichier de configuration des indexs
      codecManager - Manager de codec
